nasb.text: On the east side, 4,500 cubits, shall be three gates: the gate of Joseph, one; the gate of Benjamin, one; the gate of Dan, one.

esv.text: On the east side, which is to be 4,500 cubits, three gates, the gate of Joseph, the gate of Benjamin, and the gate of Dan.

cnv.text: 東面的長度是二千二百五十公尺，有三個門口，一個是約瑟門，一個是便雅憫門，一個是但門。

ccb.text: 东面的墙是二点五公里长，有三道门，分别是约瑟门、便雅悯门和但门。
